checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: ci_wait polls gh pr checks with 30s interval, max 20 attempts. post_merge_memory creates closure branch from main, marks scope completed, writes closure.json, commits, pushes, opens PR with auto-merge. apply-mode always writes run artifact to $runPath. All per contract.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: Pilot guard updated to allow ci_wait and post_merge_memory. command_boundary updated. Test updated to use issue_create as unsupported op. All validators and CLI tests pass.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changes limited to apply-mode execution block in specbridge.ps1 and the apply-unsupported-op test. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment changes.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No protected files changed. No credentials accessed. No authentication or authorization changes. post_merge_memory only touches scope files and evidence files it creates.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: CLI test suite passes. apply-unsupported-op test updated to use issue_create. apply-blocked test still passes. All PASS, no FAIL.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI pending for the issue 140 PR. Final report marks CI as not_collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records the implementation: ci_wait and post_merge_memory added, run artifact persistence fixed, test updated. Completion status is complete_pending_pr_ci. Risks documented.

findings.evidence: ci_wait polls at 30s intervals for max 20 attempts (10 min). Long CI runs may hit the timeout and report timed_out. This is intentional: the operator must not block indefinitely.
findings.recommendation: If CI regularly exceeds 10 minutes, increase maxAttempts or the retry interval in a future task.

findings.evidence: post_merge_memory creates branches named specbridge/memory-closure-{taskId}. These branches persist after their PRs merge. Consider adding a cleanup mechanism in a future task.
findings.recommendation: Add branch deletion after the closure PR merges in a future operator expansion.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 140 branch.
ci_wait max polling timeout is 10 minutes.
Closure branches from post_merge_memory accumulate over time.
